inputs.label: Neck Circumference
inputs.businessContext: Neck circumference measured just below the larynx

inputs.label: Waist Circumference
inputs.businessContext: Waist circumference measured at the level of the navel

inputs.label: Hip Circumference
inputs.businessContext: Hip circumference at the widest point (only for females, set 0 for males)

formulas.bodyFatPercentage: (gender === 0) ? (86.010 * Math.log(waist - neck) / Math.log(10) - 70.041 * Math.log(height) / Math.log(10) + 36.76) : (163.205 * Math.log(waist + hip - neck) / Math.log(10) - 97.684 * Math.log(height) / Math.log(10) - 78.387)
